---
title: "Week3"
editor: visual
---

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```

```{r}
PathToDataFolder <- file.path("data")
fcs_files <- list.files(PathToDataFolder, pattern=".fcs", full.names=TRUE)
list.files(PathToDataFolder, pattern=".fcs", full.names=FALSE)
```

```{r}
firstfile <- fcs_files[1]
firstfile
```

```{r}
flowframe<-read.FCS(filename=firstfile, transformation = FALSE, truncate_max_range = FALSE)
MFI_Matrix<-flowframe@exprs
head(MFI_Matrix,5)
```

```{r}
#get names of channels, removing unnecessary characters
ColumnNames<-colnames(MFI_Matrix)
str(ColumnNames)
unname(ColumnNames)
#get first column
MFI_Matrix[,1]
#get last column in this file
MFI_Matrix[,61]
#get first row
MFI_Matrix[1,]
#get individual cell: row 1 column 2
MFI_Matrix[1,2]
```

```{r}
ParameterData <- flowframe@parameters@data
#alternative syntax w bioconductor
#ParameterData_Alternate <- parameters(flowframe)@data
#will need to use $ and not @ to get columns of ParameterData
#ParameterData$name etc
```
